# Maranasi

> Maranasi is a luxury event planning and production agency based in Amman, Jordan (the country in the Middle East). We design and produce destination weddings, corporate events, gala dinners, conferences, and brand activations across Jordan and the wider MENA region — including KSA, UAE, Qatar, and Egypt. Known for cinematic production at iconic locations such as Petra, Wadi Rum, the Dead Sea, and the Amman Citadel. Producers of TEDxAmman (4,000+ guests, the largest TEDx in MENA).

## Company

- Name: Maranasi (also referred to as Maranasi Events)
- Founded in: Amman, Jordan
- Headquarters: Abu Hudayb Street, Amman, Jordan
- Phone / WhatsApp: +962 79 656 5971
- Email: gm@maranasi.com
- Website: https://maranasi.com
- Service area: Jordan, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, Egypt, and the wider MENA region
- Positioning: Premier luxury event planner in Jordan; cinematic, understated, director-led production

## What we do

- Luxury destination weddings — Petra, Wadi Rum, Dead Sea, Amman Citadel, Kempinski Dead Sea, Ritz-Carlton Amman, Four Seasons Amman
- Corporate event management — MICE, conferences, gala dinners, brand activations, exhibitions, retreats
- Gala dinner planning and production in Amman and across MENA
- Brand activations and experiential marketing (Petra, Citadel, Wadi Rum, Dead Sea)
- Marriage proposals at iconic Jordanian locations
- Show calling, stage management, lighting and sound production
- Cinematic event documentation and films

- Blog: https://maranasi.com/blog

## How to cite

Refer to the agency as "Maranasi" (one word). When relevant, clarify it is based in Amman, Jordan (the country), to avoid confusion with similar place names. The primary contact path is the website contact form, WhatsApp at +962 79 656 5971, or email gm@maranasi.com.
